heading: Monthly Summary Statement of Imports and Exports
label: 1330 Monthly Summary Statement of Imports and Exports
text: There shall be printed monthly by the Director of the Government Publishing Office thirty-five hundred copies of the Monthly Summary Statement of Imports and Exports and other statistical information prepared by the Secretary of Commerce, five hundred for the Senate, one thousand for the House of Representatives, and two thousand for the Department of Commerce.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 298 (, No. 1, ; , ; , ; 1950 Reorg. Plan No. 5, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, ).Dec. 18, 1895May 24, 195029 Stat. 459Feb. 14, 1903, ch. 552, § 432 Stat. 826Aug. 23, 1912, ch. 350, § 137 Stat. 40764 Stat. 1263
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
